items.title: Spurs closing in on Senesi move and hopeful of Robertson deal
items.summary: Marcos Senesi is edging closer to a move to Tottenham after positive talks this week.

items.title: Republic of Ireland edge past Qatar in friendly as both sides end with 10
items.summary: Captain Nathan Collins headed the Republic of Ireland to a 1-0 friendly victory over World Cup-bound Qatar as both sides were reduced to 10 men.

items.title: Price reels in Big Fish MID-LEG then gets telling off by ref!
items.summary: Gerwyn Price reels in Big Fish mid-leg and then gets a telling off by referee Huw Ware in the Premier League Darts semi-final.

items.title: Barca weigh up move for Hincapie - Friday's gossip
items.summary: Barcelona weigh up move for Piero Hincapie, Ruben Dias instructs agents to explore move away from Manchester City, Liverpool pushing for quick agreement with Yan Diomande, plus more.

items.title: Arsenal chief: Keeping Arteta is 'utmost priority'...
items.summary: Arsenal co-owner Josh Kroenke has said tying Mikel Arteta down to a new contract is an "utmost priority" ahead of the club's Champions League final against Paris Saint-Germain.

items.title: Sources: Spurs closing in on Liverpool's Robertson...
items.summary: Tottenham are moving closer to a deal to sign Andy Robertson on a free transfer, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: USA boss Pochettino holds initial talks with AC Milan
items.summary: Mauricio Pochettino has held initial talks with AC Milan to become their next manager following the sacking of Massimiliano Allegri.

items.title: 🎵 'Waka Waka'? 'Dai Dai'? World Cup song ranks
items.summary: "Dai Dai" is the latest installment of FIFA's hit-or-miss catalog of official World Cup songs. Here's where all 10 rank, from worst to best.

items.title: Brazil's Neymar (calf) may miss World Cup opener
items.summary: Neymar could be sidelined for up to three weeks with a muscle strain in his right calf, Brazil national team doctor Rodrigo Lasmar said on Thursday.

items.title: Sources: Éderson close to joining Man United
items.summary: Manchester United are close to an agreement with Atalanta for midfielder Éderson, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Gordon arrives in Barcelona to finalize $81M move
items.summary: Anthony Gordon has arrived in Barcelona to complete a €70 million ($81m) move to the Spanish champions from Newcastle United.

items.title: Sources: USMNT coach Poch met Milan over job
items.summary: USMNT coach Mauricio Pochettino insisted that he is 100% committed to the U.S. squad heading into the World Cup, despite not denying contact between his camp and AC Milan.

items.title: Sources: Barcelona hopeful of signing Álvarez
items.summary: Barcelona will turn their attention to Atlético Madrid's Julián Álvarez after agreeing a deal to sign Anthony Gordon, various sources have told ESPN.
